description: Retrieve a patient's complete clinical record. Returns a Bundle of all resources related to the patient. Provide id at the top level of the operate call. Optional filters: start, end (date range), _type (comma-separated resource types to include), _since (only resources updated after this instant), _count (page size).

start.description: Start date for care date range filter (YYYY-MM-DD)

end.description: End date for care date range filter (YYYY-MM-DD)

_type.description: Comma-separated FHIR resource types to include (e.g. Condition,Observation)

_since.description: Only include resources updated after this instant (ISO 8601)

_count.description: Maximum number of resources per page

description: Fetch the most recent or last N observations for a subject, grouped by code. Requires patient or subject AND category or code. Use max to control how many observations per group (default 1).

code.description: Observation code(s), comma-separated LOINC or SNOMED codes

description: Validate a FHIR resource against server rules and optionally a specific profile. Provide resourceType at the top level of the operate call (not in params). Provide body (full FHIR JSON) at the top level. For update/delete validation, also provide id at the top level. Returns an OperationOutcome.

mode.description: Validation mode: create, update, or delete

notes: body required unless mode=delete; mode=delete requires id

description: Find document references for a patient. US Core operation that returns a Bundle of DocumentReference resources. Requires patient. Optional date range and type filters.

start.description: Start date for document period filter (YYYY-MM-DD)

end.description: End date for document period filter (YYYY-MM-DD)

description: Expand a ValueSet into its individual codes. At type level, provide url to identify the value set. At instance level, provide id. Use filter for server-side text search within the expansion. Use count to limit results.

url.description: Canonical URL of the ValueSet to expand (type-level)

filter.description: Text filter applied to code display names during expansion

count.description: Maximum number of codes to return in the expansion

includeDesignations.description: Include additional designations in the expansion (true/false)

description: Look up a code in a code system to retrieve its display name, definition, and properties. Provide system and code, or a Coding.

displayLanguage.description: Language for the display (BCP-47 code, e.g. en, fr)

description: Translate a code from one value set/code system to another using a ConceptMap. At type level, provide url to identify the ConceptMap. At instance level, provide id. Requires system, code, and target or source scope.

source.description: Source ValueSet URL (scope for the source code)

target.description: Target ValueSet URL (scope for the translated code)

targetsystem.description: Target code system URL (alternative to target ValueSet)

reverse.description: Reverse the direction of the map (true/false)

description: Generate an International Patient Summary (IPS) document for a patient. Returns a Bundle (document) containing a Composition and referenced clinical resources. Provide id at the top level of the operate call.

profile.description: IPS profile URL to generate against

graph.description: GraphDefinition URL controlling which resources to include

notes: IPS support varies by server — metadata-gated

description: Find patient records matching demographics. Body MUST be a FHIR Parameters resource with a 'resource' parameter containing a Patient resource with demographics (name, birthDate, gender, telecom, address). The server auto-injects 'onlyCertainMatches=true' into the body — do NOT include it yourself.
notes: MPI/matching support varies by server — metadata-gated
